summary: Frontend-only testing of two new features: 1) Dashboard Recent Style selector with 4 styles (Línea, Tarjeta, Compacto, Banda) in Appearance page. 2) Package field (Básico/Intermedio/Completo) toggle in Appearance → Campos visibles → Reserva. All 8 test cases passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both features fully working. 4 dashboard styles (Tarjeta=grid cards, Compacto=dense dots, Banda=left color stripe, Linea=single row) all render correctly. Package field toggles on/off from Appearance and shows Básico/Intermedio/Completo options in reservation form. Note: btn-nueva-reserva data-testid not found on reservations list; button accessed via 'button:has-text(Nueva Reserva)' instead.

test_results.package_shows_when_enabled: PASS - options: Sin paquete, Básico, Intermedio, Completo
